achievements.title: I Suffer For My Art
achievements.description: Get hit by 3 unique things in a row.

achievements.title: An Investment Most Fowl
achievements.description: Gain 3 lives within 3 seconds of getting hurt.

achievements.description: Air run to safety and avoid falling to your death.

achievements.description: Air run your way into the next scene.

achievements.title: The Spring in Your Step
achievements.description: Get past the tall stack of crates in Country (1-3), without pushing the loose crate.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: This Pond is Mine. MINE!
achievements.description: Gain $12,000 in the pond of Lakeside (2-3).
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Rude
achievements.description: Blow up the completely harmless buzzard in Plateau (5-2).
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Country Cabbage
achievements.description: In a new game, Clear Country and earn $50,000 in it. (No bonus lives passwords.)

achievements.title: No Harm, No Fowl
achievements.description: Pacifist Challenge: Clear Country without using dynamite and without losing any lives.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Lentil Lake
achievements.description: Hunger Challenge: Clear Lakeside without eating any food and without losing any lives.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: The Abominable Ballad of Hugo and George
achievements.description: Pacifist Challenge: Clear Snowy Mountain without using dynamite and without losing any lives.

achievements.title: Forest Frenzy
achievements.description: Reach Bugs in Forest without losing any lives.

achievements.title: Plateau Panic
achievements.description: Reach Bugs in Plateau without losing any lives.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Desert Discord
achievements.description: Reach Bugs in Desert without losing any lives.
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Arachnid Aversion
achievements.description: Defeat Bugs in Forest without losing any lives. (You can retry the fight by starving to death.)
achievements.author: Tybis

achievements.title: Cool as a Cactus
achievements.description: Defeat Bugs in Plateau without losing any lives. (You can retry the fight by falling or starving to death.)

achievements.title: This Duck Can Dodge
achievements.description: Defeat Bugs in Desert without losing any lives. (You can retry the fight by starving to death.)

achievements.title: Abtholutely Dethpicable
achievements.description: Clear the game without using passwords.
